format_detected: Allstate/Xactimate estimate with cover letter page, adjuster summary guide page (sample/reference), and detailed line-item estimate page for Dwelling Roof section. Source listed as Eagle View. Columns: Description, Quantity, Unit, RCV, Age/Life, Condition, DEP%, Depreciation, ACV.
warnings: Only Page 3 (Dwelling Roof detail) contains extractable line items. Page 1 is the cover letter and Page 2 is a generic Allstate adjuster summary reading guide (sample data for John Smith — not the insured's data).

The estimate appears to be truncated — only the Dwelling Roof section (Page 3) is visible. Additional sections, summary totals, deductible, net claim, and O&P figures likely appear on subsequent pages not provided.
No document-level summary page was provided, so totals fields (deductible, net claim, recoverable depreciation, O&P) could not be populated.
Non-recoverable depreciation (NRD) cannot be determined per line item from the visible pages — no NRD column or annotation is visible. Set to null throughout.
O&P rates and totals are not visible in the provided pages.
Price List shown as TXDF8X_OCT24 (Texas, October 2024 Restoration/Service/Remodel).
Roof measurements: 3627.71 SF Surface Area, 36.28 Squares, 344.53 LF Perimeter, 81.31 LF Ridge, 190.18 LF Hip Length.
Line item 2 ACV shown as 733.94 but RCV (1467.89) minus depreciation (733.95) = 733.94 — minor rounding difference of $0.01, acceptable.
Line item 3 quantity (42.33 SQ) is higher than roof area (36.28 SQ) due to 16.7% auto-calculated waste factor (6.05 SQ).
Only pages 4-6 of the estimate are provided; earlier pages (1-3) containing Main Dwelling line items 1-17 and possibly other sections are not included in this batch.
Claim number, policy number, date of loss, property address, and adjuster name are not visible in the provided pages.
Non-recoverable depreciation (NRD) cannot be determined per line item from the visible pages — no NRD column or annotation is present.
The 'Main Dwelling' section total (RCV: 24,513.09, Dep: 6,118.21, ACV: 18,394.88) references line items not visible in these pages (items 1-17 presumably on earlier pages).
The 'Source - Eagle View' total (RCV: 28,041.68) appears to be a subtotal before Labor Minimums; the Line Item Total is 28,237.97 which includes Labor Minimums of 196.29.

The coverage summary page shows ACV Total of 21,309.39 but the Line Item Totals show ACV of 20,838.41 — discrepancy of approximately 470.98. This may be due to pages not included in this batch or a tax/additional adjustment.
Line item 19 (Reglaze window): RCV 83.40 - Dep 46.33 = 37.07 ACV — checks out.
Line item 22 (Comb and straighten a/c condenser fins): DEP% shown as 0% with Age/Life 10/NA — depreciation is 0.00 as expected.
Line item 23 (Central air condenser repair - fan guard): RCV 190.40 - Dep 126.93 = 63.47 ACV — checks out.
The Grand Total Areas page shows Surface Area of 3,627.71 SF and 36.28 Number of Squares, suggesting a roofing component exists on earlier pages.
AA-Dwelling coverage item total is 28,010.49 and BB-Other Structures is 227.48, totaling 28,237.97 which matches Line Item Totals RCV — consistent.
Unit prices for gutter/downspout items appear to be per-LF rates; the RCV values are consistent with quantity × unit price calculations.
Only summary/recap pages were provided — no individual line item detail pages are present. All section entries have empty items arrays as a result.
Line item detail (quantities, unit prices, descriptions) could not be extracted because those pages were not included in this batch.

The AA-Dwelling summary (Page 7) shows RCV $28,743.53, depreciation $7,625.42, ACV $21,118.11, deductible $6,011.00, net claim $15,107.11, recoverable depreciation $7,625.42, net claim if depreciation recovered $22,732.53.

The BB-Other Structures summary (Page 8) shows RCV $229.89, depreciation $38.61, ACV $191.28, net claim $191.28, recoverable depreciation $38.61, net claim if depreciation recovered $229.89. Note: no deductible applied to BB-Other Structures.
The Recap by Category (Page 9) grand total RCV is $28,973.42 which equals AA-Dwelling RCV $28,743.53 + BB-Other Structures RCV $229.89 — consistent.

Total depreciation from recap ($7,664.03) is slightly higher than AA-Dwelling recoverable depreciation ($7,625.42) — the difference of $38.61 corresponds to BB-Other Structures depreciation, which is consistent.
Non-recoverable depreciation cannot be determined from the provided pages — no NRD column or annotation is visible.
Claim number, policy number, date of loss, property address, and type of loss are not visible on the provided pages.
GENERAL DEMOLITION shows $0 depreciation in the recap table — this appears intentional (labor-only demolition items are typically not depreciated).

Material Sales Tax in recap ($735.45 RCV, $264.47 depreciation, $470.98 ACV) differs slightly from the sum of AA-Dwelling tax ($733.04) and BB-Other Structures tax ($2.41) = $735.45 RCV — consistent on RCV but depreciation on tax ($264.47) is not broken out per summary page.
Only pages 10 and 11 were provided. Page 10 contains only boilerplate advisory text (safety/environmental warnings and flooring grade analysis offer) — no financial or claim data extractable.
Page 11 is an Eagle View aerial roof diagram with roof section labels and dimensions only — no line items, quantities, unit prices, or dollar amounts are present.
No claim number, policy number, date of loss, insured address, or adjuster name is visible on these pages.
The insured name 'ESSA_HADDAD' is inferred from the footer identifier on both pages — this may be a file/claim reference code rather than a formatted name.
No estimate line items, section totals, or financial summary data can be extracted from the provided pages.
Additional pages (pages 1-9 and any pages after 11) are needed to extract the full estimate data including line items, depreciation, ACV, RCV, and totals.

The roof diagram on page 11 shows a complex multi-section roof with sections labeled R3(12), R5(3), R8(5), R17(1), R18(4), R20(2), R22(10), and others — these section numbers in parentheses may correspond to square counts or pitch multipliers but cannot be confirmed without the estimate detail pages.
No O&P rate, depreciation columns, or ACV/RCV values are visible on the provided pages.

[Dwelling Roof] [QC/missing_items] The PDF shows 17 line items in the Dwelling Roof section but only 5 are captured in sample_items. Items 6-17 are visible in the PDF: Flashing-pipe jack (RCV 466.40), R&R Flue cap (162.47), Furnace vent-rain cap and storm collar 6" (340.32), R&R Fireplace-chimney chase cover-sheet metal (441.94), R&R Rain cap-6" (60.94), R&R Drip edge (1216.19), Remove Additional charge for steep roof 7/12 to 9/12 (616.03), Additional charge for steep roof 7/12 to 9/12 (2004.11), Remove Additional charge for high roof (199.08), Additional charge for high roof (756.33), R&R Gable cornice return-laminated-2 stories (267.46), R&R Gable cornice return-laminated (441.56) are all missing from sample_items array. — Add all 12 missing line items to the Dwelling Roof sample_items array with their respective RCV, DEP, and ACV values.

[Main Dwelling] [QC/missing_items] Main Dwelling section has item_count=0 and empty sample_items, but the PDF shows it is a parent/wrapper section containing the Dwelling Roof subsection with 17 items totaling RCV 24,513.09. The section total is correctly captured but items are not attributed here vs. the subsection. — Clarify hierarchy: Main Dwelling is a parent section whose total equals Dwelling Roof total. Either set item_count to match Dwelling Roof or document the parent-child relationship explicitly.

[Elevations] [QC/missing_items] Elevations section has item_count=0 and empty sample_items, but it is a parent/wrapper section for Front, Right, Back, and Left Elevation subsections. The total RCV 3,347.60 matches the sum of subsection totals (504.80+1131.84+858.75+852.21=3347.60), so totals are correct but the parent-child relationship is not documented. — Document that Elevations is a rollup of the four elevation subsections. No items need to be added but item_count should reflect this or be marked as a summary section.

[Source - Eagle View] [QC/missing_items] Source - Eagle View has item_count=0 and empty sample_items but is a rollup section. Its RCV of 28,041.68 equals Main Dwelling (24,513.09) + Elevations (3,347.60) + Fencing (53.40) + Debris removal (127.59) = 28,041.68. Correct as a summary but should be flagged as intentionally empty. — Mark Source - Eagle View explicitly as a rollup/summary section with no direct line items.

[GENERAL DEMOLITION] [QC/missing_items] GENERAL DEMOLITION section shows RCV 3,841.81, DEP 0.00, ACV 3,841.81 in the recap but has item_count=0 and no sample_items. The underlying line items (likely the remove/demo items from the roof and other sections) are not extracted. — Populate with the demolition line items visible in the estimate or document that this is a recap-by-category view aggregating items already listed in other sections.

[FENCING] [QC/missing_items] FENCING recap category shows RCV 218.00 but the Fencing section only has one item (R&R Wood fence slat) with RCV 53.40. The difference of 164.60 is unaccounted for. The Labor Minimums section includes a Fencing labor minimum of 174.08 which partially explains this, but the recap total of 218.00 vs extracted 53.40 is a significant discrepancy. — Reconcile FENCING recap total (218.00) against Fencing line items (53.40) plus fencing labor minimum (174.08) = 227.48. Verify whether the recap category aggregates items from multiple sections.

[FENCING] [QC/total_mismatch] FENCING recap RCV is 218.00 but Fencing section item RCV is 53.40 and fencing labor minimum is 174.08, summing to 227.48 — a discrepancy of 9.48 vs the recap total of 218.00. — Verify the FENCING recap category total against all contributing line items. The 9.48 discrepancy may indicate a missing item or rounding issue.

[FIREPLACES] [QC/missing_items] FIREPLACES recap category shows RCV 561.36, DEP 288.59, ACV 272.77 but has item_count=0 and no sample_items. The fireplace-related items (R&R Flue cap RCV 162.47, R&R Fireplace chimney chase cover RCV 441.94) visible in the Dwelling Roof section sum to 604.41 RCV, which does not match 561.36. — Extract the fireplace-related line items and reconcile against the recap total of 561.36. Verify which items are categorized under FIREPLACES.

[HEAT, VENT & AIR CONDITIONING] [QC/missing_items] HVAC recap category shows RCV 771.76, DEP 275.36, ACV 496.40 but has item_count=0 and no sample_items. Visible HVAC items include: Roof vent turtle type (533.44), Furnace vent rain cap (340.32), Comb/straighten a/c condenser fins (181.93), Central air condenser repair fan guard (190.40), HVAC labor minimum (22.21) — these sum to 1,268.30 RCV which far exceeds 771.76, suggesting only some items are categorized here. — Identify which specific line items map to the HVAC recap category and extract them. The recap category likely excludes roofing-categorized vent items.

[ROOFING] [QC/missing_items] ROOFING recap category shows RCV 20,073.75, DEP 5,693.49, ACV 14,380.26 but has item_count=0 and no sample_items. This is the largest category and its line items are not extracted. — Extract all roofing line items from the Dwelling Roof section that map to the ROOFING category. These are likely items 2-3 (felt and shingles) and related materials.

[SOFFIT, FASCIA, & GUTTER] [QC/missing_items] SOFFIT, FASCIA, & GUTTER recap shows RCV 2,448.31, DEP 979.33, ACV 1,468.98 but has item_count=0 and no sample_items. Visible gutter/downspout items across elevations: Front (294.00+127.40=421.40), Right (759.51), Back (581.43+117.60=699.03), Left (730.88) = 2,610.82 RCV total, which exceeds 2,448.31 — suggesting some items may be categorized differently. — Extract all gutter/downspout/drip edge line items and reconcile against the recap total of 2,448.31.

[WINDOW REGLAZING & REPAIR] [QC/missing_items] WINDOW REGLAZING & REPAIR recap shows RCV 322.98, DEP 126.19, ACV 196.79 but has item_count=0 and no sample_items. Visible window items: Reglaze window (83.40), Window screen rescreen Back (159.72), Window screen rescreen Left (79.86) = 322.98 — these three items sum exactly to the recap total. — Add the three window items (Reglaze window 83.40, Window screen rescreen Back 159.72, Window screen rescreen Left 79.86) to this section with their depreciation values.

[Dwelling Roof] [QC/math_error] Item 2 (Roofing felt - 15 lb.): RCV 1,467.89 - DEP 733.95 = 733.94 ACV. The PDF shows ACV as 733.94 which is correct, but the extracted dep value is 733.95 — a $0.01 rounding difference. Minor but flagged for completeness. — Accept as rounding artifact. The ACV of 733.94 is correct per the PDF.

[totals] [QC/total_mismatch] The extracted totals show rcv=28,973.42 but the Line Item Totals from the PDF show 28,237.97 as the line item subtotal. The 28,973.42 appears to be the grand total RCV including tax (28,237.97 + 735.45 tax = 28,973.42). The field label 'subtotal' correctly shows 28,237.97 but 'rcv' at 28,973.42 conflates pre-tax and post-tax RCV. — Clarify that rcv=28,973.42 is the total RCV including material sales tax, and subtotal=28,237.97 is the pre-tax line item total. Both values are present in the PDF and correctly extracted but the field semantics should be documented.

[totals] [QC/total_mismatch] Extracted depreciation total is 7,664.03 but the sum of all section depreciation values from the recap by category (GENERAL DEMOLITION 0 + FENCING 36.60 + FIREPLACES 288.59 + HVAC 275.36 + ROOFING 5,693.49 + SOFFIT/FASCIA/GUTTER 979.33 + WINDOW 126.19 + tax depreciation 264.47) = 7,664.03. This matches, but the individual section depreciation values in the extracted data do not all reconcile to this total from the visible line items alone. — Verify depreciation total by summing all category depreciation values from the recap page. The total of 7,664.03 appears correct per the recap page.

[totals] [QC/other] The extracted deductible is 6,011.00 but this value does not appear in the visible pages of the PDF provided. The AA-Dwelling summary referenced in warnings mentions a deductible of 6,011.00 but this page is not visible in the provided images. — Confirm deductible of 6,011.00 from the summary page. If that page is not available, mark as unverified.

[totals] [QC/other] Net claim of 15,107.11 is referenced in warnings but not visible in the provided PDF pages. The calculation would be ACV (21,309.39) - deductible (6,011.00) = 15,298.39, which does not match 15,107.11. Alternatively, AA-Dwelling ACV (21,118.11) - deductible (6,011.00) = 15,107.11, which matches if only AA-Dwelling coverage is subject to the deductible. — Confirm that the deductible applies only to AA-Dwelling coverage (not BB-Other Structures), making net claim = 21,118.11 - 6,011.00 = 15,107.11. Document this in the extraction.

[overhead_and_profit] [QC/other] O&P fields are all null/false. The PDF does not show a separate O&P line item or percentage in the visible pages, but the recap by category and section totals do not include an explicit O&P line. It is unclear whether O&P is embedded in unit prices or absent entirely. — Review the full estimate for any O&P line items or percentage applied. If absent, document explicitly that no O&P was applied to this estimate.

[Dwelling Roof] [QC/nrd_missed] No NRD (non-recoverable depreciation) indicators are visible in the PDF pages provided. All depreciation appears to be recoverable based on the recap showing recoverable depreciation equal to total depreciation for AA-Dwelling (7,625.42). However, NRD cannot be fully confirmed without seeing all pages. — Set nrd=0 for all items where no NRD indicator is present, rather than null, to distinguish 'confirmed zero NRD' from 'NRD unknown'.
